zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnès de Bruyères於1274年出生在法國i萊-德-福朗斯艾頌布盧艾雷勒-a特爾時，她的父親Jean Ier de Bruyères46歲，母親Eustachie de Lévis-Mirepoix29歲。她於1289年與Renaud II Dargies在法國豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯阿爾可斯結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世於1329年之前在法國豪-德-福朗斯索姆韓格斯吉-桑特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Agnès de Bruyères于1274年出生在法国i萊-德-福朗斯艾頌布盧艾雷勒-a特爾时，她的父亲Jean Ier de Bruyères46岁，母亲Eustachie de Lévis-Mirepoix29岁。她于1289年与Renaud II Dargies在法国豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯阿爾可斯结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。她去世于1329年之前在法国豪-德-福朗斯索姆韓格斯吉-桑特。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Bruyères
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Fernand, Jacques, Marcel.

French (Bruyère): from Old French bruiere ‘heather’, hence a topographic name for someone who lived in a place where heather grew, or a habitational name from one of the places in France (for example in Calvados) named with this word. Compare Labruyere .
Altered form (Bruyère) of French Bruguier: habitational name from (Le) Bruguier, the name of several places in the southeastern part of France, a cognate of 1 above.

variants.name: Labruyere
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Camille, Jean-Philippe.

French (Labruyère): variant, with fused feminine definite article la, of Bruyère ‘heather’ (see Bruyere 1), a topographic name for someone who lived in a place where heather grew, or a habitational name from one of the places in France named La Bruyère.
Altered form (Labruyère) of French Labrière, a cognate of 1 above (see Labrier ).

variants.name: Briere
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Andre, Pierre, Adrien, Aurele, Benedicte, Benoit, Colette, Fernand, Gaston, Marcel, Micheline.

French (Brière): topographic name from a regional variant of Old French bruiere ‘heather’ (see Bruyere ), or a habitational name from La Brière, the name of several places mainly in the northern part of France, from the same word.
History: Jean Brière from Clarbec in Calvados, France, married Jeanne Grandin in Quebec City, QC, in 1671.

nameMeanings.name: Agnès
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

en.lifeSummary: When Agnès de Bruyères was born in 1274, in Bruyères-le-Châtel, Essonne, Île-de-France, France, her father, Jean Ier de Bruyères, was 46 and her mother, Eustachie de Lévis-Mirepoix, was 29. She married Renaud II Dargies in 1289, in Arques, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died before 1329, in Hangest-en-Santerre, Somme, Hauts-de-France, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Agnès de Bruyères est née en 1274, à Bruyères-le-Châtel, Essonne, Île-de-France, France, son père, Jean Ier de Bruyères, avait 46 ans et sa mère, Eustachie de Lévis-Mirepoix, avait 29 ans. Elle a épousé Renaud II Dargies en 1289, à Arques, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Elle est décédée avant 1329, à Hangest-en-Santerre, Somme, Hauts-de-France, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Agnès de Bruyères 1274 in Bruyères-le-Châtel, Essonne, Île-de-France, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Jean Ier de Bruyères 46 und ihre Mutter Eustachie de Lévis-Mirepoix 29. Sie hat 1289 in Arques, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich Renaud II Dargies geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb vor 1329 in Hangest-en-Santerre, Somme, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Agnès de Bruyères è nata il nel 1274 nel Bruyères-le-Châtel, Essonne, Île-de-France, Francia, sua padre, Jean Ier de Bruyères, aveva 46 anni e sua madre, Eustachie de Lévis-Mirepoix, aveva 29 anni. Lei sposato Renaud II Dargies nel 1289, nel Arques, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì prima del 1329, nel Hangest-en-Santerre, Somme, Hauts-de-France, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Agnès de Bruyèresが1274年にフランスiレ-デ-フランスエソンブルイeレス-レ-チaテルで生まれた時，父Jean Ier de Bruyèresは46歳，母Eustachie de Lévis-Mirepoixは29歳であった。1289年にフランスハウトス-デ-フランスプアス-デ-カレイスアルクスでRenaud II Dargiesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1329年以前にフランスハウトス-デ-フランスソンメハンジェスト-エン-サンテアで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Agnès de Bruyères(이)가 1274년 프랑스 i레-데-프랜스 에손 브루이e레스-레-cha텔에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Jean Ier de Bruyères(은)는 46세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Eustachie de Lévis-Mirepoix(은)는 29세였다. 그녀는 1289년 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 파스-데-캘레이 아크스에서 Renaud II Dargies(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1329년 이전 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 솜 핸그스트--산티르에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Agnès de Bruyères nasceu em 1274, em Bruyères-le-Châtel, Essonne, Île-de-France, França, seu pai, Jean Ier de Bruyères, tinha 46 anos e sua mãe, Eustachie de Lévis-Mirepoix, tinha 29 anos. Ela casou-se com Renaud II Dargies em 1289, em Arques, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ela faleceu antes 1329, em Hangest-en-Santerre, Somme, Hauts-de-France, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnès de Bruyères родилась в 1274 г. в местности бруиeрес-ле-чaтел, эссонн, iле-де-фрэнс, Франция, её отцу по имени Jean Ier de Bruyères было 46 лет, а матери, которую звали Eustachie de Lévis-Mirepoix, 29. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Renaud II Dargies в 1289 г. в местности аркуесь, пас-де-калеи, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла перед 1329 г. в местности хангест-ен-сантирр, сомм, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Agnès de Bruyères nació en 1274, en Bruyères-le-Châtel, Essonne, Île-de-France, Francia, su papá, Jean Ier de Bruyères, tenía 46 años y su mamá, Eustachie de Lévis-Mirepoix, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Renaud II Dargies en 1289, en Arques, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió antes de 1329, en Hangest-en-Santerre, Somme, Hauts-de-France, Francia.
